name: TAYZ.T
description: A maintenance robot repurposed into a lethal lab guard across the yard. It is the baseline of the Ominent robot family: simple, relentless, and surprisingly dangerous in numbers.
respawnInfo: It does not respawn once destroyed.
specialTraits: It is immune to shock damage, bleed, gas hazard, poison, and venom. Its Gold Card drops when every world-spawn TAYZ.T has been defeated, excluding the Assistant Manager summons.

attacks.name: Hit
attacks.tell: It steps forward with its taser arm for a short blunt strike.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it head-on or move diagonally out of range.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Hit
attacks.tell: It chains three hits by rotating through its front limbs.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block the full sequence or wait for the end before punishing.
attacks.notes: This is the pattern that most punishes poor stamina control.

attacks.name: Charged Jab
attacks.tell: It charges electricity into its arm before a long thrust.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep or perfect-block at the last moment.
attacks.notes: Applies shock on top of the physical hit.

behavior: It patrols labs for intruders and sounds its sirens as soon as it acquires a target. Its moveset mirrors the RUZ.T, only with better damage and sturdier stats.
interactionWithPlayer: It treats the player as an immediate threat and will chase through lab corridors and platforms. Even so, all of its attacks are readable and blockable as long as you are not fighting too many at once.
interactionWithCreatures: It attacks any creature that breaks into the labs and cooperates freely with ARC.R and RUZ.T units.
strategy: Busting, sour, and salty are your best answers. In groups, the key is breaking lines of sight and never letting several TAYZ.T chain combos into the same block.
